nodes.title: Get Warehouses List
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouses. Returns array of warehouses for business. Requires bizId auth. Returns 200 with [{id, name, warehouseType, stationId, ...}].

nodes.title: Post Warehouse Operation
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/warehouse-operations with body {operationType: 'receipt'|'dispatch', warehouseId, items: [{inventoryItemId, quantity}], ...}. Updates inventory_stock and creates movement records. Returns 201 with created operation. Returns 400 if insufficient stock for dispatch.
